name: auditlens
description: Enterprise GRC compliance engine — scans documents against ISO 27001, SOC 2, HIPAA, NIST CSF, PCI DSS. Gap analysis, maturity scoring, cross-framework mapping, interactive audit workspace, vendor security scoring, evidence provenance tracking, and NL audit queries. Integrates with Google Workspace (gws) and Microsoft 365 (m365).
author: Adhithya Rajasekaran
